title: Medieval Mysteries
description: Medieval survival with Create mod. Inspired by the classic approach of the game, so there are no unnecessary and "spam" mods
body:
## Dependencies & Copyright
Mod pack uses dependencies that require the author to specify. Such as:

#### Mods
- [Terralith](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/terralith)
- [Galosphere](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/galosphere)

#### Resource packs

- [Fantasy ores by Cesarzorak](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fantasy-ores-by-cesarzorak)

## Overview
Minecraft Medieval Mod pack is a collection of mods that aim to bring the medieval theme to your Minecraft experience. The modpack includes mods for mobs, weapons, engineering, and a little bit of magic, all of which are designed to enhance the medieval feel of the game.

One of the key features of the modpack is the inclusion of mods for mobs. It includes a range of mods that add new bosses to the game. These bosses are much more difficult to defeat than regular mobs, and require a greater level of skill and strategy to defeat. In addition to the new bosses, the modpack also adds harder versions of regular mobs. These mobs are more challenging to defeat than their regular counterparts, and may have special abilities or higher stats. This makes them more challenging to fight, but also more rewarding to defeat. the modpack may include mods that add new dimensions to the game. These dimensions are separate from the main game world, and may have their own unique themes, mobs, and challenges. Exploring and conquering these new dimensions can add a whole new level of depth and excitement to the game.

"Create" is a mod included in the Minecraft Medieval Modpack that brings the mechanics of rotational energy to the game. It consists of gears and shafts, which can be used to transfer rotational energy from one source to another. With this mod, players can create functional machinery and devices that use rotational energy, such as conveyor belts, trains, and tools.

Overall, the "Create" mod is a great addition to the Minecraft Medieval Modpack, as it adds a new level of realism and complexity to the game. With the ability to create and use rotational energy, players can build and operate a wide range of mechanical devices and systems. Whether you are a seasoned engineer or a beginner, the "Create" mod has something to offer you!

Finally, the modpack includes a little bit of magic, with mods that add new, magical items and blocks to the game. These mods add a touch of fantasy to the medieval theme, and allow players to experience a little bit of magic in their Minecraft world.

Overall, Minecraft Medieval Modpack is a great modpack for players who are looking to bring a medieval theme to their Minecraft experience. The modpack is optimized, which means it has been designed to run smoothly and efficiently on a wide range of computers. So, if you are a fan of medieval themes and want to experience them in Minecraft, this modpack is definitely worth checking out!
